data.title: Contract: MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL comment interface
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Notes
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md defining the MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL interface:
- Signal Name: MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL
- Emitter: sprint-manual-drain.sh (written to ticket comment after each story handshake)
- Parser: completion-verifier.md Step 3a (reads sentinel to close manual:awaiting_user stories)
- Fields:
  - audit_token: string (ISO timestamp + session hash, e.g. "2026-04-19T23:00:00Z:abc123")
  - verification_command_exit_code: integer or null (0=pass, non-zero=fail, null=no verification_command)
  - user_input: string (confirmation token text if no verification_command, else null)
  - story_id: string (ticket ID of the manual story)
  - handshake_outcome: "done" | "skip" | "done_with_story_id"
- Example JSON in comment body:
  MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL: {"audit_token":"2026-04-19T23:00:00Z:abc123","verification_command_exit_code":0,"user_input":null,"story_id":"abc1-2345","handshake_outcome":"done"}
- Sentinel comment format: body starts with literal "MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL: " prefix followed by JSON on one line
- Absent sentinel means story is mid-handshake or not yet reached; completion-verifier must not fail on absent sentinel

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0) if any Python files touched
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] Contract document exists at correct path
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md
- [ ] Contract document contains Signal Name field
  Verify: grep -q "MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md
- [ ] Contract document contains Emitter and Parser fields
  Verify: grep -q "Emitter" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md && grep -q "Parser" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md
- [ ] Contract document defines all required fields (audit_token, verification_command_exit_code, user_input, story_id, handshake_outcome)
  Verify: grep -q "audit_token" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md && grep -q "verification_command_exit_code" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/manual-pause-sentinel.md
- [ ] Referential integrity check passes for contract doc (no dead paths)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 1
